'''Daran Norris''' is a voice actor who provided voices for several ''[[Star Wars]]'' media.

==Works==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
**[[G0-T0]]
**Additional voices
*''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]''
**[[Durge/Legends|Durge]]
**[[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi Mundi]]
**[[Daakman Barrek]]
**[[Tarr Seirr]]
**[[Even Piell/Legends|Even Piell]] (Volume II)
**[[Unidentified henchman (the Cauldron)|Henchman]]
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
**[[Zelka Forn]]
**Additional voices
*''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)]]''
**[[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]]
**Engineer
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''
**[[Gault Rennow]]
